calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Carleton Sooy, Esq. for Plaintiff: California Pacific Bank, a California Banking Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael Johnson, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Jeffrey Hsin-Chang Lee and Pei-Wen Wang as follows:
Principal $4,033,105.60
Prejudgment Interest $916,287.30
Late charges $18,987.54
Foreclosure costs $5,000.00
Utility costs $227,818.92
Attorney's Fees $55,189.00
($50,000.00 received from Defendant: Lee Cheng Chang)
Total (due and owing as of Jan. 6, 2005) $5,245,472.41
Judgment signed in open court.

Amended Judgment rec'd in court, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
